description_long: This object consists of two modern residential houses situated on a landscaped plot with sloped terrain. Each house features a gable roof and large rectangular windows, with outdoor patios and green lawns surrounding the structures. The houses are separated by a central driveway and garden area, with a paved path leading to the main entrances. The property includes a driveway with a parked car and retaining walls that follow the contour of the land. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with minimalistic landscaping and a clean, geometric layout. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A pair of modern gable-roofed houses on a landscaped, sloped plot with large windows, patios, and a central driveway. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and open green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses side by side, the central driveway, and the landscaped lawn with retaining walls.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the length of the houses, the driveway, and a parked car near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patios, large windows, and the sloped terrain with retaining walls.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the rear of the houses, patios, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors accessed by paved paths, with minimal overhangs and no prominent decorative elements.
